translation: self.assertEqual("Blanks encoding with the Q codec test", encoded1, s)
self.assertEqual("Blanks encoding with the Q codec test", encoded2, s)
self.assertEqual("Blanks decoding with the Q codec test", plain, s)
self.assertEqual("Blanks decoding with the Q codec test", plain, s)
self.fail("Trying to url encode a Double object should cause an exception.")
self.assertIsNone("Encoding a null Object should return null", result)
self.assertIsNone("Null string Q encoding test", qcodec.encode2(None))
self.assertIsNone("Null string Q decoding test", qcodec.decode0(None))
self.assertEqual("Unsafe chars Q encoding test", "=?UTF-8?Q?=3F=5F=3D=0D=0A?=", encoded)
self.assertEqual("Unsafe chars Q decoding test", plain, qcodec.decode0(encoded))
self.assertEqual("Basic Q encoding test", "=?UTF-8?Q?=3D Hello there =3D=0D=0A?=", encoded)
self.assertEqual("Basic Q decoding test", plain, qcodec.decode0(encoded))
